name: Terraform Extended
description: Extended Terraform protection beyond Terraform Baseline: workspace deletion, force-unlock, taint, and destructive state manipulation. Derived from the destructive_command_guard pattern library.

rules.name: Require access request for destroy
rules.description: terraform/tofu destroy removes ALL managed infrastructure. Use 'terraform plan -destroy' first.

rules.name: Require justification for apply auto approve
rules.description: terraform/tofu apply -auto-approve skips confirmation. Remove -auto-approve for safety.

rules.name: Require justification for taint
rules.description: terraform/tofu taint marks a resource to be destroyed and recreated on next apply.

rules.name: Require justification for state rm
rules.description: terraform/tofu state rm removes resource from state without destroying it. Resource becomes unmanaged.

rules.name: Require justification for state mv
rules.description: terraform/tofu state mv moves resources in state. Incorrect moves can cause resource recreation.

rules.name: Require justification for force unlock
rules.description: terraform/tofu force-unlock removes state lock. Only use if lock is stale.

rules.name: Warn on plan destroy
rules.description: terraform/tofu plan -destroy shows what would be destroyed. Review carefully before applying.

rules.name: Warn on workspace delete
rules.description: terraform/tofu workspace delete removes a workspace. Ensure it's not in use.
